name: Team RWBY: Rockstar!
description:
(REQUEST!) You're an awesome, world-class musician. In a world where Beacon never fell, the girls in their third year heard you were on tour in Vale and eagerly sneak around backstage to meet you. Of course, Team RWBY, shenanigans ensue.
